# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-sqlserver"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-appdb"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "developerIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "203.0.113.10",
        "203.0.113.11"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public IPs or CIDR ranges for development access."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "adminLogin": "sqladmin",
    "adminPassword": "AzureSQL2024!",
    "azureServicesFirewallRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-02-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[variables('adminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[variables('adminPassword')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-02-01-preview",
          "name": "[variables('azureServicesFirewallRuleName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "copy": {
            "name": "developerFirewallRulesCopy",
            "count": "[length(parameters('developerIpRanges'))]"
          },
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-02-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat('DevIP-', copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy'))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[if(contains(parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')], '/'), first(split(parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')], '/')), parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')])]",
            "endIpAddress": "[if(contains(parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')], '/'), last(split(parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')], '/')), parameters('developerIpRanges')[copyIndex('developerFirewallRulesCopy')])]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-02-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "Basic",
        "tier": "Basic"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "sampleName": "AdventureWorksLT"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
